titles.en: Clarification of the Transmission Chain to Al-Hasan Ibn Ziyad
Clarification of the Transmission Chain to Al-Hasan Ibn Ziyad

segments: ه عن الحسن بن زياد فقد رويته عن محمّد بن موسى بن المتوكّل- رضي اللّه عنه- عن عليّ بن الحسين السعدآباديّ، عن أحمد بن أبي عبد اللّه البرقيّ عن أبيه، عن يونس بن عبد الرّحمن، عن الحسن بن زياد الصيقل، و هو كوفيّ مولى و كنيته أبو الوليد.
arabic.text: ه عن الحسن بن زياد فقد رويته عن محمّد بن موسى بن المتوكّل- رضي اللّه عنه- عن عليّ بن الحسين السعدآباديّ، عن أحمد بن أبي عبد اللّه البرقيّ عن أبيه، عن يونس بن عبد الرّحمن، عن الحسن بن زياد الصيقل، و هو كوفيّ مولى و كنيته أبو الوليد.

segments: Everything in this book that is narrated from Al-Hasan ibn Ziyad has been transmitted by me from Muhammad ibn Musa ibn Al-Mutawakkil - may Allah (swt) be pleased with him - from Ali ibn Al-Husayn Al-Sa'dabadi, from Ahmad ibn Abi Abdullah Al-Barqi, from his father, from Yunus ibn Abd Al-Rahman, from Al-Hasan ibn Ziyad Al-Sayqal. He was a Kufan, a freed servant (mawla), and his kunya was Abu Al-Walid.
en.bab-ul-qaim-publications.text: Everything in this book that is narrated from Al-Hasan ibn Ziyad has been transmitted by me from Muhammad ibn Musa ibn Al-Mutawakkil - may Allah (swt) be pleased with him - from Ali ibn Al-Husayn Al-Sa'dabadi, from Ahmad ibn Abi Abdullah Al-Barqi, from his father, from Yunus ibn Abd Al-Rahman, from Al-Hasan ibn Ziyad Al-Sayqal. He was a Kufan, a freed servant (mawla), and his kunya was Abu Al-Walid.
